about.title:
Family is the warmest
name in the world.
about.p1: FamilyBond began with a single hope: that everyone who has lost a family member can find their back home.
about.p2: In a modern society where the value of family is often faded, we leverage the power of technology and small courage from individuals to create miracles of reunion.
about.p3: Your small concern and interest can be the last puzzle piece in a lost family's story.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: How do I register a story?
faq.a1: Click the 'Post a Story' button in the home screen header to start the registration process.
faq.a2: No, FamilyBond is 100% free of charge. We operate with the sole goal of reuniting families.
faq.q3: How is my personal information protected?
faq.a3: All sensitive information is securely encrypted. Contact details are only shared after administrator review and verification.
faq.q4: How does the matching process work?
faq.a4: When a matching story is found, our administrators verify the facts and then facilitate the connection between the parties.
faq.q5: What should I do if I find a suspected family member?
faq.a5: Please leave a message through the 'Heart' button on the story detail page with as much detail as possible.
faq.q6: Can I edit my registered story?
faq.a6: Yes, you can manage and edit your posts through your profile after logging in.
faq.a7: Yes, FamilyBond supports multiple languages and can be accessed from anywhere in the world.
faq.q8: How long does the verification take?
faq.a8: Typically, it takes 24-48 hours, but it may vary depending on the complexity of the case.
faq.q9: What kind of evidence can I upload?
faq.a9: You can upload photos, detailed descriptions, and even audio recordings (voice messages).
faq.a10: Spreading our stories on social media is the greatest support you can provide.

quotes: Family is the warmest word in the world.
As long as we don't forget, the bond is never broken.
Your small courage creates a miracle.
